hero.lead: Car rental with driver or self-drive — hospital trips, weddings, travel or urgent needs. Clean, on time, trustworthy.

services.title: Where do you need to go?

drive.title: Self-drive or with driver?
drive.driverBody: An experienced driver picks you up. Just hop in — ideal for the elderly, hospital trips and events.
drive.selfBody: Drive yourself, on your own schedule. Quick paperwork, car delivered to your door — good for short local trips.

partner.title: Have a car to rent out?
partner.body: Turn your idle car into income. We handle customers, scheduling and contracts — you earn monthly.
partner.formIntro: Leave your details and the garage will call you back.
partner.success: Received. The garage will call you back soon.
partner.error: Something went wrong. Please call us directly.

detail.gestureHint: Swipe to rotate · pinch to zoom
detail.gestureHintSpin: Swipe sideways to rotate the car
detail.selfNote: Deposit required · car delivered to your door
detail.priceFootnote: * Reference prices. Long trips, overnight or holidays may incur surcharges — please call for an exact quote.
